title: Running Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates how to run Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic coding tool, on Amazon Bedrock to keep data within AWS infrastructure. The walkthrough covers environment setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking, and Bedrock Guardrails for governance.
writeup: This walkthrough shows how to run Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic coding tool, against Amazon Bedrock so model traffic stays inside AWS infrastructure. The setup matters for teams that need data residency and governance while using an agentic coding workflow. Concrete topics include environment configuration, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking, and Bedrock Guardrails for content moderation.
